title: Add BDD specs + step defs for E1
description: Add feature scenarios and steps for HttpGif upload protocol, command list chunking, and PicID lifecycle.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Beginning BDD changes for E1/E2/E3 with new native command behavior and compatibility guards.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Replaced legacy animation BDD with native sequencing/playback/cycle scenarios and step definitions; added command-level assertions for PicID/PicOffset/PicNum/PicSpeed and chunking semantics.
